title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at EaseMyTrip - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
